comment_text:
Canelo and Bud Crawford are true generational talents, in the same class as legends like Floyd, Pacquiao, GGG, Lomachenko, Usyk, Roy Jones Jr., Hopkins, Ward, and Toney. These fighters let their skills speak — not the drama.

They’re not about the circus or staged rivalries. They fight for something bigger: their legacy and the love of the sport. That’s what real fans appreciate.

Like Bivol and Beterbiev, Canelo & Bud Crawford are cut from the same cloth — straight-up warriors who let their hands do the talking.

Dear His Excellency Turki Alalshikh — with respect, please don’t feel you have to sell these fights.

— A boxing fan
